transcript.text:
[In a quiet village]
[What?]
[What happened?]
3kgs of beef
[What in the...]
[What is that?!]
[Just eating a meal]
[Yes, 1 meal]
I can raise a cow, but not Tzuyang
[That's right~!]
[News article saying Tzuyang came over to a village to eat 30 servings of beef]
That lady is here in Ulleungdo!
[A beautiful, mysterious island]
[Ulleungdo (Ulleung Island)]
[Tzuyang arrives in Ulleungdo]
I'm going to live here for a month

[Ramyun noodles with Ulleungdo seafood!]
[Let's get it]
[No need for words]
[Balanidae Noodles (only in Ulleungdo)]
[Mussel Balanidae Rice (only in Ulleungdo)]
[Ulleungdo's Spicy Squid & Pork]
[All of it]
[Came to an acceptance]
[Tzuyang is in Ulleungdo?]
[Ulleungdo's Squid]
This really ain't it
[A variety of food here in Ulleungdo]
[Cooked on a stone grill]
[With kimchi, the perfect side dish]
[Is it tasty?]
[Life in Ulleung Island with Gom-soon]

[Starts now!]
[Ulleung-gun, North Gyeongsang Province]
The beach is so beautiful here in Ulleungdo
The cliff is beautiful too
It heals my body
Hello~!
Do you have a lot of Bacchus? (energy drink)
Bacchus? Yes
[Just a sec]
I'm going to live here for a month
Are you a student?
I'm not a student
I film myself eat
-Ulleungdo? -Right, Ulleungdo as well
Hair salon
Hello!

I'm here for a month Here's some Bacchus
For what?
No need to give me these
They're for you
-Do you want some tea? -It's okay!
Are there good restaurants here?
No
[Total despair]
Do you want Ramyun noodles?
I'll come back to do my hair next time
Thank you
[Found a women's clothing store]
[With Bacchus]
Thank you
-Let me know if you need any help -Really?
Thank you

I found a really old guest house here
Should we say hello?
Hello!
I'm here in Ulleungdo for a month
-What is this? -Bacchus
-For me? -Yes
Thank you
Health is everything [I will make sure!]
Thank you
You're like my granddaughter
I've been living on this island for so long
So I can't see my grandkids, daughter-in-law, So I was not feeling too well
[Gives her comfort]
I will come by whenever I can!
Be healthy
Thank you

Ta-da!
This is where I will be staying for a month
Check this out
Do you see that view?
It's so clear
I love it
[Very excited]
[And the ocean-view house]
Hello (Gom-soon)
Hello! Hand!
She gave me her hand!
That was so nonchalant
This looks like something in a movie
[But how about the view?]
This view is no joke
You can see an island there (Jukdo)

I haven't had anything yet, so I'm going to head out to eat
I prepared the cauldron pot lid
I also got my hands on Ulleungdo squids and Dokdo prawn
I'm going to cook Ramyun noodles with them
Wow, oh my goodness That's so hot
I just started the fire here
HOT!
You'd have to eat some noodles on the first day
So I got these seafoods here
I can't sit here because of the heat
I got them when it was alive, but they seem dead now
It's huge
It's still moving!
Ulleungdo is known for their squids
[Humongus]
That's gigantic!

1 still wouldn't fill me up though
Dokdo prawns here too
2 different types of prawns
Amazing
Let's put the squids in first
Bye squid
This one's a little bigger
I think it's ready
Their guts are bursting out
Some sauce first
About that much?
I bought some abalone too
5 of them!
[Taste test]
It's just about right Tasty
8 of them!

Let's put the prawns in now
[Dokdo prawns]
[Ulleungdo's Seafood Ramyun Noodles]
[Finish it up with green onions]
Wow, that looks so good
Ramyun noodles on the first day
I had seafood Ramyun noodles at Yokji Island
It wasn't that good if I'm being honest, because I put too much water
But today's look fantastic
Bon appetit
That looks amazing
This can't even compare to the one I had at Yokji Island
So tasty
Seafood flavor is great
That's crazy
Amazing

The background view is amazing, right?
Insane
Whole abalone
Look how meaty this is
Is this Ulleungdo abalone? It's so delicious
Why is it starting to get gloomy?!
It's windy all of a sudden
[Whatever, let's just eat!]
That's incredible
Let's get the squid
I was going to eat it as a whole, but it's way too big
Why is it so thick? I've never seen squid this big
This is almost like an octopus
Whole-cooked squid
Scoop it up like this
I was told Ulleungdo's squid is amazing

Let's give it a try
The intestines are not bitter
The taste of the squid is very strong
The guts mixed with the soup,
It's like crab broth
Sikhye as a drink! (Rice Punch)
[As it starts to get gloomy]
It's gotten dark and windy in 10 minutes
Ulleungdo's weather changes very often
Do you see that island? That's Jukdo
You can also see Dokdo all the way in the back on a very clear day
Dokdo is our land!
That's amazing Prawns need to be eaten
I'll try this prawn first
Look at the color
These are good as sashimi

This is not the right way
I'm doing it wrong
The meat comes out just like this
That color
The texture is completely different from a regular shrimp
Amazing
It's similar to Crangon
Looks similar too
With some noodles
With squid and its guts
Let's eat this separately
That's so deep
The squid is different too
Compared to Korea, I mean...
The consistency is different compared to the ones in Seoul
That's amazing

Some kimchi with this
Today's Ramyun noodles has to be the best one I've had in the past 10 years
Japanese spiny lobster prawn I wonder if it's any different
You have to be careful when peeling these
The spikes! It hurts!
The meat comes right off
Why is it so sweet?!
This is even sweeter
Let's cut up the whole squid
Then the guts should get mixed in with the soup
I figured my shirt would be a mess
[Even more of a mess now]
[Rage lvl 1]
[Rage lvl 2]
There's no going back
It was getting windy anyway

This is the producer's
Whatever
It tastes a little different eating it together
Since I'm here at Ulleungdo and they're known for squids
I'd have to eat it again cooked in a different way
Gom-soon!
[Me?]
Come here!
Hello!
Hand!
Good girl
There's nothing here I can give her
I'll get you snacks next time
[Expensive snacks]
The sky is filled with clouds now
[But I'm not full yet]

Cut it in half
Take it out
Let's cut everything up so that it's easier to eat
Get it like this,
Producer's windbreaker will become a mess too
[Evil smile]
Cut up the squid
Grab the 4th joint
Take it out like this
It's all ready to eat now
Everything's good to go
There are some cons to living here in Ulleungdo
It's very hard to go in and out of Ulleungdo (Not many boats available)
Also, a lot of roads are under construction
It would be really nice to have an airport here soon
The view here really makes up for everything

The texture is unbelievable
3 at once
3 Dokdo prawns in 1 bite
It's completely different
How is it this sweet?
She's just like my cat Jingu
Jingu always lays in the back when I do mukbang
Gom-soon is doing the same
Abalone and squid guts in the soup With prawn heads
This isn't Ramyun What is this creation?
A gourmet cuisine
The soup is amazing
The head
Will I be able to eat it?
It's filled with meta
That's crazy

[Can't throw this out]
That was such a nice meal
Let's go over here
I wish the weather was a little better
Good meal nontheless
I came to Ulleungdo today
Great scenery and delicious foods here in Ulleungdo
I will be showing all of that to you guys
Thanks everyone~
[See you again soon!]
Our country's native cattle
Tiger stripes
I'm curious
[Do you want to see?]
[Welcome]
[Tiger Cattle]

About 30 servings
Are you serious?
[Of course!]
[Thumbs up!]
How are you eating all of that?
[Amazing]
Where's that going to?
[2 thumbs up]
[Serious]
I can raise a cow, but not Tzuyang
[A mukbang that shocked everyone!]
